dashboard.label: SOC Incidents (Workflow)
dashboard.description: Incidents generated by the SOC workflow (critical YARA detection → AI triage → notable incident), rendered as A2UI → @splunk/react-ui cards: verdict, counters, collapsible analysis.

html.div: ⚙️ Automated SOC workflow — the scheduled alert Find Evil - Auto Triage Workflow detects critical detections, runs | ai triage and writes an incident. Refresh this view with bin/gen_a2ui.py.
